channel.title: management on hi
channel.description: Recent content in management on hi

item.title: Jevons Paradox
item.description: Why efficiency improvements in technology often increase total consumption rather than reduce it, and how leaders can anticipate and manage the inevitable rebound.

item.title: Resilient Management
item.description: Think about your team for a moment. How well is it functioning? Are you currently on a high-performing team, having found your groove and flow state as a group? Are you on a team that isn’t quite in that magical state of being yet, but it feels like you’re on your way? Are you feeling some friction—frustration, confusion—with your team? Or have you just joined a new team, so none of these apply yet?
